title: VAPT — Windows Enterprise Internship Lab
description: Hands-on Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing engagement on a simulated enterprise environment (Windows Server 2008 R2, Windows Server 2019, Windows 10, DVWA) during the HCLTech–Amity Cybersecurity Internship. Covered recon, SMB exploitation to SYSTEM-level Meterpreter access, post-exploitation credential harvesting, and web app testing for SQLi/XSS.

title: Phishing Attack Simulation & Defense Analysis
description: A controlled phishing simulation project analyzing how credential-harvesting pages are deployed and defended against, built for an HCLTech–Amity Cybersecurity submission. Covers Zphisher setup, template-based fake login pages, and public tunneling — with defensive takeaways for recognizing and mitigating phishing attacks.
